problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: If Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
